## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `php artisan ...`
2. Open `...`
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| Package version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Laravel version | e.g. 13.x |
| PHP version | e.g. 8.3 |
| OS | e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 |

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
